The '''''Ravagor''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] operating in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]].

One mission in the months following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] was a [[Battle of Aguarl 3|strike]] against an underwater [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base on the planet [[Aguarl 3]]. The destroyer launched [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], including one piloted by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]], which damaged the base and caused it to flood.

The ''Ravagor'' used its [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]] to retrieve Trommer's bomber, which had been damaged in the attack.

==Appearances==
*[[River of Chaos 1|''River of Chaos'' 1]] {{1st}}
